# s402 -- Chain-Agnostic HTTP 402 Payment Protocol

> s402 is an open wire format for HTTP 402 machine-to-machine payments. Five payment schemes (Exact, Prepaid, Escrow, Stream, Unlock), zero runtime dependencies, wire-compatible with x402 (Coinbase). ~400ms finality on Sui, $0.014 per thousand API calls via Prepaid scheme.

## What is s402?

s402 is a TypeScript protocol layer for HTTP 402 payments. It provides wire format encoding/decoding, five payment schemes, and a machine-native error model with 15 typed error codes (each with retryable flag + recovery action). Zero runtime dependencies. Chain-agnostic core with Sui-native reference implementation.

## Five Payment Schemes

- **Exact** -- One payment, one resource. Atomic settlement. x402-compatible baseline.
- **Prepaid** -- Deposit once, make 1000+ API calls, batch-claim. Gas: $0.014 total vs $7.00 per-call.
- **Escrow** -- Time-locked vault with optional arbiter dispute resolution.
- **Stream** -- Per-second billing with on-chain rate cap.
- **Unlock** -- Pay-to-decrypt encrypted content (Walrus + SEAL).

## Key Facts

- License: Apache-2.0
- Zero runtime dependencies
- x402-compatible (Coinbase's EVM payment protocol)
- 133 machine-readable conformance test vectors
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/s402

## Documentation

- Quick Start: https://s402-protocol.org/guide/quickstart
- How It Works: https://s402-protocol.org/guide/how-it-works
- Which Scheme: https://s402-protocol.org/guide/which-scheme
- Tutorial: https://s402-protocol.org/guide/tutorial
- Security Model: https://s402-protocol.org/security
- API Reference: https://s402-protocol.org/api/
- FAQ: https://s402-protocol.org/faq

## Payment Schemes

- Exact: https://s402-protocol.org/schemes/exact
- Prepaid: https://s402-protocol.org/schemes/prepaid
- Escrow: https://s402-protocol.org/schemes/escrow
- Stream: https://s402-protocol.org/schemes/stream
- Unlock: https://s402-protocol.org/schemes/unlock

## Quick Example

```typescript
import { extractRequirementsFromResponse, encodePaymentPayload, S402_HEADERS } from 's402';

// 1. Client makes a request, server returns 402
const res = await fetch(url);
if (res.status !== 402) return res;

// 2. Decode requirements
const requirements = extractRequirementsFromResponse(res);

// 3. Build payment (you bring the chain SDK)
const payment = await buildPayment(requirements);

// 4. Retry with payment
return fetch(url, {
  headers: { [S402_HEADERS.PAYMENT]: encodePaymentPayload(payment) },
});
```

## Error Handling

Every s402 error includes: code, retryable flag, suggestedAction.

```typescript
import { s402Error } from 's402';

try {
  await facilitator.process(payload, requirements);
} catch (e) {
  if (e instanceof s402Error) {
    console.log(e.code);            // 'SETTLEMENT_FAILED'
    console.log(e.retryable);       // true
    console.log(e.suggestedAction); // 'Transient RPC failure -- retry in a few seconds'
  }
}
```

## Source

- GitHub: https://github.com/s402-protocol/core
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/s402
- Protocol docs: https://s402-protocol.org
